# Current Auth State Review

Project: MOGHARE360 ERP
Mission: Mission 7
Document Type: Current Auth State Review
Scope: Design Documentation Only

## Existing Prototype Files
The current project has prototype admin authentication files:

- erp-admin-login.php exists
- erp-admin-dashboard.php exists
- erp-admin-logout.php exists

## Current Auth Status
Current Auth is Prototype only.

It is suitable for controlled admin prototype work but is not yet Production Auth.

## Production Auth Status
Production Auth is not implemented yet.

## Legacy Boundaries
The following legacy or sensitive files must not be changed in Mission 7:

- staff-auth.php
- access-control.php
- config.php
- config.example.php

## Mission 7 Decision
Mission 7 does not change login behavior.
Mission 7 does not change existing PHP files.
Mission 7 only documents the Auth Context design.
